summary: Ported CSS classes from three _biography/powers/accents panel blocks to inline Tailwind utilities and deleted the source blocks from the monolith.

classes_ported.notes: JS hook retained (wh40k-tab class kept for primary-sheet-mixin querySelector); active display override needed because base stylesheet sets display:flex!important

classes_dead: all rules in block — targeted .wh40k-tab[data-tab='overview'], .wh40k-tab-overview, etc.
actor tabs use wh40k-nav-item class not wh40k-tab, making all rules dead code

classes_ported.utilities_added: tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-between tw-mb-2 tw-pb-1 tw-border-b tw-border-b-[var(--wh40k-border-color-light)]
classes_ported.notes: SECTION_CLASS_RE in css-coverage.mjs excludes this class from tailwind-only check; 12 instances updated

classes_ported.utilities_added: tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-1 tw-font-semibold tw-uppercase tw-tracking-wide tw-text-sm tw-text-[color:var(--color-text-secondary)]
classes_ported.notes: SECTION_CLASS_RE excludes this class from tailwind-only check

classes_ported.utilities_added: tw-bg-transparent tw-border tw-border-[var(--wh40k-border-color-light)] tw-text-[color:var(--wh40k-text-muted)] tw-cursor-pointer tw-py-1 tw-px-2 tw-rounded-md tw-transition-all tw-text-xs hover:tw-bg-[var(--wh40k-panel-bg-translucent)] hover:tw-border-accent-bio hover:tw-text-accent-bio
classes_ported.notes: JS hook in JS_HOOKS set in css-coverage.mjs; 2 instances

classes_ported.utilities_added: tw-text-xs tw-font-semibold tw-text-success tw-py-0.5 tw-px-1.5 tw-bg-success/15 tw-rounded
tw-text-xs tw-font-semibold tw-text-accent-combat tw-py-0.5 tw-px-1.5 tw-bg-accent-combat/15 tw-rounded

classes_ported.notes: JS hook in JS_HOOKS; wh40k-journal-notes modifier also got tw-flex-1 tw-min-h-[150px]
JS hook in JS_HOOKS; some instances get per-system color variant chain

classes_ported.utilities_added: tw-w-full tw-p-2 tw-bg-[var(--wh40k-bg-input)] tw-border tw-border-[var(--wh40k-border-light)] tw-rounded-md tw-text-[color:var(--color-text-primary)] tw-text-sm tw-leading-[1.5] tw-resize-y tw-font-[inherit] focus:tw-outline-none focus:tw-border-gold placeholder:tw-text-[color:var(--wh40k-text-muted)] placeholder:tw-italic

tw-flex-1 tw-min-h-[250px] tw-bg-[var(--wh40k-bg-input)] tw-border tw-border-[var(--wh40k-border-light)] tw-rounded-md tw-overflow-y-auto tw-text-[0.9rem] tw-leading-[1.6] focus:tw-outline-none focus-within:tw-border-accent-bio
classes_ported.notes: JS hook in JS_HOOKS; .ProseMirror child rules salvaged to foundry-chrome.css block in monolith

classes_ported.utilities_added: tw-p-2 tw-bg-[var(--wh40k-bg-input)] tw-border tw-border-[var(--wh40k-border-light)] tw-rounded-md tw-text-[0.9rem] tw-leading-[1.6] tw-min-h-[100px]
classes_ported.notes: Child-type rules (p, ul, ol, h1-h3, :empty::before) salvaged to foundry-chrome.css block in monolith

classes_ported.utilities_added: tw-w-full tw-py-[6px] tw-px-[8px] tw-bg-[var(--wh40k-bg-input)] tw-border tw-border-[var(--wh40k-border-light)] tw-rounded-md tw-text-[color:var(--color-text-primary)] tw-text-[0.9rem] focus:tw-outline-none focus:tw-border-gold

notes: field-row.hbs partial was already fully ported to pure TW utilities before this session — no wh40k-field-* classes present
journal-panel.hbs partial was already fully ported to TW utilities

wh40k-origin-* classes in item-origin-path-sheet.hbs are a different component (wh40k-origin-sheet, wh40k-origin-header, wh40k-origin-tabs, etc.) — not the same as the wh40k-origin-{path,step,...} classes that were dead code in _biography.css

css-coverage.mjs JS_HOOKS and SECTION_CLASS_RE patterns exempt many biography block classes from the tailwind-only classification check — templates were already classified tailwind-only before explicit TW utilities were added
wh40k-tab-powers: wh40k-tab is a JS hook queried in primary-sheet-mixin.ts querySelector('.wh40k-tab.active[data-tab="..."]') — must not be removed from HTML
